creator: damjan.jov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #7)

Thank you for your help. Here is my pciconf -lv:

    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = '4th Gen Core Processor DRAM Controller'
    class      = bridge
    subclass   = HOST-PCI
